'''Indobok''' was the living [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]], orbiting near [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]]. In actuality, it was a giant [[B'rknaa]]. The other B'rknaa that lived on Indobok were Indobok's children.

Indobok's canyons and valleys were frequently hit with powerful ash storms.

{{Moon-stub}}
